title: Layout
content:
### Container Class The `.container` class sets max-width based on the current breakpoint and centers with `mx-auto`: ```html
``` ### Display Utilities ```html
Block level
Inline-block
Inline
Flex container
Grid container
Inline flex
Display: none
``` ### Position Utilities ```html
/* position: static */
/* position: relative */
/* position: absolute */
/* position: fixed */
/* position: sticky */
``` ### Top / Right / Bottom / Left ```html
/* top: 0; left: 0 */
/* top/right/bottom/left: 0 */
/* left/right: 0; bottom: 0 */
/* top: 1rem; right: 1rem */
/* top: 50%; left: 50% */ ``` ### Overflow ```html
/* scroll if content overflows */
/* clip overflowing content */
/* always show scrollbars */
/* allow overflow */
/* horizontal scroll */ ``` ### Z-Index ```html
/* z-index: 0 */
/* z-index: 10 */
/* z-index: 50 */
/* z-index: auto */ ``` Z-index goes from `z-0` through `z-50` with increments of 10. ### Visibility ```html
/* visibility: visible */
/* visibility: hidden (takes space) */ ```
codeExample: Overlay Content

quiz.question: Which class sets position to absolute and top/right/bottom/left all to 0?
What does the container class do in Tailwind?
options: Both sets max-width and centers with mx-auto when combined
